text: Welcome to Bachelor of Science in Landscape Architecture! I am Emma, your career mapping assistant.
You are at zero percent. Click any milestone to start.

label: Complete professional lexicon framing
Develop foundational design process
Master analog and digital representation
Map the global history of designed landscapes
Apply site analysis fundamentals
Advance digital visualization pipeline
Understand landscape materials and construction methods
Build regional plant identification fluency
Lead participatory co-design with community stakeholders
Design with plants as spatial and ecological systems
Analyze and design within ecological systems
Produce professional construction documents — 'Billable on Day One'
Articulate a personal design philosophy
Master site engineering and grading
Design integrated stormwater management systems
Build licensure-ready portfolio and CLARB pathway plan
Apply geospatial analysis to landscape planning
Conduct field-based master planning research
Complete professional internship (300+ hours)
Write competitive design proposals and grants
Collaborate across disciplines in integrated project delivery
Critically analyze contemporary landscape issues
Prepare for professional practice and LARE examination
Execute capstone design-research project
ISLA: Pass LARE Section 1 — Project & Construction Management
ISLA: Pass LARE Section 2 — Inventory & Analysis
ISLA: Pass LARE Section 3 — Design
ISLA: Pass LARE Section 4 — Grading, Drainage & Construction
